name: medical-stats-research-assistant
description: Medical Statistics Research Assistant — unified pipeline: raw data → statistical report → (optional) submittable paper via ARS academic-pipeline integration
author: boangus

/msra.name: MSRA Pipeline
/msra.description: Launch unified pipeline: data → stats report → (optional) paper track. Auto-detect entry point.

/msra-paper.name: MSRA Paper Track
/msra-paper.description: Enter Paper Track (Stage 5.0): convert stats report into a submittable paper via academic-pipeline. Requires completed Stage 4 with track=full_paper.

/msra-data.name: Data Preparation
/msra-data.description: Data validation, cleaning, and quality gate

/msra-plan.name: Analysis Planning
/msra-plan.description: Create and review statistical analysis plan

/msra-calibrate.name: Calibration
/msra-calibrate.description: Run metric calibration against gold standard, or view calibration status

/ars-full.name: ARS Full Pipeline
/ars-full.description: Full academic research pipeline: research → write → review → revise → finalize. Uses built-in academic-pipeline skill.

/ars-plan.name: ARS Paper Planning
/ars-plan.description: Socratic chapter-by-chapter paper planning. Uses built-in academic-paper skill.

/ars-outline.name: ARS Paper Outline
/ars-outline.description: Generate paper outline through Socratic dialogue. Uses built-in academic-paper skill.

/ars-abstract.name: ARS Abstract
/ars-abstract.description: Generate structured abstract from paper draft. Uses built-in academic-paper skill.

/ars-revision.name: ARS Revision
/ars-revision.description: Paper revision + Response to Reviewers. Uses built-in academic-paper skill.

/ars-revision-coach.name: ARS Revision Coach
/ars-revision-coach.description: Guided revision coaching with commitment tracking. Uses built-in academic-paper skill.

/ars-format-convert.name: ARS Format Convert
/ars-format-convert.description: Export paper: MD → DOCX → PDF. Uses built-in academic-paper skill.

/ars-reviewer.name: ARS Paper Reviewer
/ars-reviewer.description: Multi-perspective paper review (5 reviewers). Uses built-in academic-paper-reviewer skill.

/ars-lit-review.name: ARS Literature Review
/ars-lit-review.description: Systematic literature search and synthesis. Uses built-in deep-research skill.

/ars-citation-check.name: ARS Citation Check
/ars-citation-check.description: Verify citation accuracy and completeness. Uses built-in academic-paper skill.

/ars-disclosure.name: ARS AI Disclosure
/ars-disclosure.description: Generate AI usage disclosure statement. Uses built-in academic-paper skill.

/ars-mark-read.name: ARS Mark Read
/ars-mark-read.description: Mark a paper as read in the literature corpus. Uses built-in deep-research skill.

/ars-unmark-read.name: ARS Unmark Read
/ars-unmark-read.description: Unmark a paper as read in the literature corpus. Uses built-in deep-research skill.
